textPlain: This reminds me of a little project [1] I had fun with to try and compute the sharpness of a position and/or evaluate whole lines. Indeed, the notion of sharpness (which I believe it’s different from complexity) although easy to intuit I’ve never found a satisfactory implementation.[1] https://github.com/ghyatzo/stockfish-line-sharpness
I was disappointed in the article, as I was primed for some 'complexity theory' type discussion, e.g. emergence,
